reviews.review_description:
This app is basically an interactive podcast, a poorly one too.

When you start the app you are greeted with a huge meditating shadow of a Buddha sitting in the middle of water with a beautiful golden sunset sky. 

On the Buddha you will find chakra hotspots that also act as buttons, each hotspot take you to a program that consists of 4 chapters where the narrator talks about the different properties and practices of the chakra. 

That’s all to it. I could’ve gotten the info off YouTube or any chakra guidebook for free or tenth of the price.

reviews.review_title: Amazing. I learned so much about chakras
reviews.review_description: So cool to choose a chakra and then learn more about it and the meditation music and chakra-specific VR is awesome!
